div.div:
Discover Config + Load Results
discover.py: find eval.yaml
read skill field → eval-name
state.py read summary.yaml
read eval.yaml (schema, judges)
deterministic vs LLM judges

div.div:
Present Overview
read analysis.md if present
mention report.html link
pass rates per judge
passed-all vs failed counts
pairwise win/loss/tie
ask: all / failures / specific?

div.div:
Walk Through Cases
human-in-the-loop (AskUserQuestion)
judge scores + rationale + type
pairwise winner per case
summarize output files (no dump)
ask feedback: judges miss anything?
empty feedback = acceptable
